name: Chimichangas
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop or shred the filling ingredients.
2. In a skillet, melt bacon grease over medium heat.
3. Saute the meat, onion, garlic, tomatoes, chiles and potatoes until the onions are soft.
4. Add salt, oregano, chili powder and cilantro; simmer for 2-3 minutes.
5. Place a scant 1/2 cup of filling on each tortilla.
6. Fold the tortillas envelope-style like a burrito.
7. Fry in 1/2 inch of hot oil (360-375°F) until crispy and brown, turning once to ensure even cooking.
8. Drain briefly on a paper towel.
9. Place on a serving plate and top with shredded cheese, a dollop of sour cream and salsa.
10. Place shredded lettuce next to the chimichanga and add chopped tomatoes.
11. Serve immediately.
